description_long: This is a pair of women's heeled slip-on shoes featuring a tapestry-style fabric upper adorned with a floral pattern in shades of green, pink, white, and black. The shoes have a closed, rounded toe and an open back, with a medium-height, slightly flared black heel. The insole appears to be lightly cushioned and is a light beige color, providing comfort for the wearer. The outsole and heel are made of a solid, likely synthetic material, offering durability and support. The overall design is elegant and decorative, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings.
description: A pair of floral-patterned, slip-on heeled shoes with a tapestry fabric upper and black medium-height heels. The shoes feature a closed toe and open back, blending comfort with decorative style.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open backs and the flared black heels, highlighting the slip-on design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the floral tapestry upper, the full length of the shoe, and the medium-height heel.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the rounded, closed toes and the detailed floral pattern on the upper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the floral upper and the heel, with a clear view of the shoe's profile.
